prose:
**Nitrobenzene Fukui reactivity — computed result**

**Method/provenance:** Fukui indices from finite-difference Mulliken charges using DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**) with the PySCF DFT backend, **gas phase** (no solvent), charge 0, multiplicity 1. Input geometry was the user-supplied XYZ file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz` and was used as supplied. The cation/anion states used for the Fukui finite differences were charge +1 / multiplicity 2 and charge −1 / multiplicity 2. Density fitting was not requested. Partial-charge scheme: Mulliken (PySCF).

**Headline result:** most electrophilic atom = atom 4, C, with **f+ = 0.49641782**. Most nucleophilic atom = atom 5, C, with **f− = 0.1072882**.

**Per-atom Fukui results**

| atom | element | f+ | f− | f0 | dual descriptor |
|---:|:---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 1 | O | 0.47317276 | 0.097015524 | 0.28509414 | 0.37615724 |
| 2 | O | 0.47344363 | 0.096773921 | 0.28510877 | 0.37666971 |
| 3 | N | -0.45670088 | 0.017243458 | -0.21972871 | -0.47394434 |
| 4 | C | 0.49641782 | -0.014292037 | 0.24106289 | 0.51070986 |
| 5 | C | 0.11562653 | 0.1072882 | 0.11145736 | 0.0083383283 |
| 6 | C | 0.11588204 | 0.10723661 | 0.11155932 | 0.0086454353 |
| 7 | C | 0.17412423 | 0.094922441 | 0.13452334 | 0.079201792 |
| 8 | C | 0.1742294 | 0.094892499 | 0.13456095 | 0.079336905 |
| 9 | C | 0.28913576 | 0.0083116096 | 0.14872368 | 0.28082415 |
| 10 | H | -0.23168969 | 0.075212029 | -0.078238833 | -0.30690172 |
| 11 | H | -0.23181693 | 0.075202557 | -0.078307186 | -0.30701949 |
| 12 | H | -0.13372477 | 0.083883283 | -0.024920743 | -0.21760805 |
| 13 | H | -0.13379393 | 0.083881905 | -0.024956013 | -0.21767584 |
| 14 | H | -0.12430597 | 0.072428004 | -0.025938984 | -0.19673397 |

**Integrity/convergence checks:** chemkit `integrity.trustworthy` = `true`; status = `ok`. Fukui charge-conservation checks passed: `sum(f+) = 1.0000` and `sum(f-) = 1.0000`.

**Warnings:** no warnings array was returned by the tool.

**Reproducibility artifacts:** plot returned by the tool: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/argo_gpt-5.5/20260704-150410_nitrobenzene_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`. The tool result did not include a live `.out` log path, so I cannot report one without fabricating it. CLI invocation reported by chemkit: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults --stdout path /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpgrhue4do/live.json`.
